adults.clue: What do shells feel like when you pick them up?
adults.correctQuestion: Hard and smooth or bumpy

adults.clue: Where would you go to collect shells?
adults.correctQuestion: The beach

adults.clue: What sea animal lives inside a clam shell?
adults.correctQuestion: A clam

adults.clue: What color are many seashells found on the beach?
adults.correctQuestion: White, pink, or tan

adults.clue: Is a pearl found inside or outside a shell?
adults.correctQuestion: Inside

adults.clue: What do you use a bucket for at the beach?
adults.correctQuestion: To collect shells

adults.clue: What is the name of a spiral-shaped shell?
adults.correctQuestion: Snail or conch shell

adults.clue: What animal has a shell that opens and closes?

adults.clue: What would you find if you held a shell to your ear?
adults.correctQuestion: The sound of the ocean

adults.clue: When is the best time to collect shells?
adults.correctQuestion: After a storm or at low tide

adults.correctQuestion: Sand dollar or scallop

adults.correctQuestion: Pearl

adults.correctQuestion: Flip-flops or water shoes

adults.clue: What does a shell protect?
adults.correctQuestion: The soft body of an animal

adults.clue: What do you call searching for shells?
adults.correctQuestion: Shell hunting or shell collecting

adults.correctQuestion: Beach glass or frosted glass

adults.correctQuestion: Waves

adults.clue: What shape are starfish?
adults.correctQuestion: Star-shaped or five-pointed

adults.correctQuestion: Sunscreen and water

adults.clue: What color might a special shell be that you find?
adults.correctQuestion: Purple, orange, or rare colors

adults.clue: What is a net used for at the beach?
adults.correctQuestion: To catch or scoop shells from water

adults.clue: What two things do shells have?
adults.correctQuestion: An outside (hard) and inside (soft part)

adults.clue: What happens to shells when waves crash?
adults.correctQuestion: They get washed onto shore

adults.correctQuestion: Rare shells or beautiful colors

adults.clue: What is the sandy edge where waves meet called?
adults.correctQuestion: The shore or shoreline

adults.clue: Which mollusks have two equal shell halves?

adults.clue: What mineral do shells primarily contain?

adults.clue: What tide exposes more shells on the beach?
adults.correctQuestion: Low tide

adults.correctQuestion: Its fan shape and ridged texture

adults.correctQuestion: Ribs or ridges

adults.correctQuestion: Conch or queen conch

adults.clue: Why should you never collect living shells?
adults.correctQuestion: Because they still have living animals inside

adults.correctQuestion: Layers of nacre reflecting light

adults.correctQuestion: Sea star or starfish

adults.correctQuestion: Several years or even decades

adults.correctQuestion: Its spiral chamber pattern and beauty

adults.correctQuestion: Thicker, heavier shells

adults.correctQuestion: With fresh water and a soft brush

adults.correctQuestion: Barnacle shells or broken shells

adults.correctQuestion: From tide pools to the deepest trenches

adults.correctQuestion: A perfect, undamaged shell with clear provenance
